title: Misty Valley Farm & Harmony Distillery
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Just six kilometres outside...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Just six kilometres outside Hartenbos, Misty Valley Farm and Harmony Distillery have become the go-to destination for families, food lovers, and gin enthusiasts.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Just six kilometres outside Hartenbos, Misty Valley Farm and Harmony Distillery have become the go-to destination for families, food lovers, and gin enthusiasts."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nominated in multiple categories in this year’s Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards – including Best Restaurant, Best Distillery, Best Kids Party Venue, Best Family Outing, and Best Outdoor Dining – Misty Valley is truly where memories are made."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From hearty breakfasts, wood-fired pizzas and gourmet burgers to Harmony Distillery’s premium gin tastings, every visit promises a flavour adventure. And it’s not just about the food - it’s about the experience.","html":"From hearty breakfasts, wood-fired pizzas and gourmet burgers to Harmony Distillery’s premium gin tastings, every visit promises a flavour adventure. And it’s not just about the food - it’s about the experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The farm’s spacious outdoor and indoor play areas are perfect for little explorers. With a jungle gym, jumping castle, and loads of space to run free, Misty Valley is a haven for kids’ parties and weekend adventures.","html":"The farm’s spacious outdoor and indoor play areas are perfect for little explorers. With a jungle gym, jumping castle, and loads of space to run free, Misty Valley is a haven for kids’ parties and weekend adventures."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Parents can relax with a refreshing craft gin or farm-fresh coffee while the children play safely within view.","html":"Parents can relax with a refreshing craft gin or farm-fresh coffee while the children play safely within view."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The on-site deli offers delicious biltong, frozen meals, and more - much of it made on the farm.","html":"The on-site deli offers delicious biltong, frozen meals, and more - much of it made on the farm."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our hours are:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mon, Tue, Thu 08:00 - 17:00","Wed, Fri, Sat 08:00 - 22:00","Proudly cashless."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Misty Valley Farm and Harmony Distillery invite you to eat, sip, play, and celebrate together.","html":"Misty Valley Farm and Harmony Distillery invite you to eat, sip, play, and celebrate together."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
